title: AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2353 / 57 OG No. 5, 802 (January 30, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2757, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sum appropriated in item (

k

), page 109, subparagraph 48, for the Province of Sorsogon, paragraph

a

, Title B, Section one of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred, to wit:

"(k) Dancalan-Pangpang-Gimagaan-Vinisitahan-Tinanogan-Sibago-San Rafael-Sta. Cruz Road, Donsolâ

Construction P20, 000.00"

is hereby reappropriated for the construction of the Donsol-Banuangurang-Javellar Road, Municipality of Donsol, Province of Sorsogon.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
